title: Rewards & Offers
content:
At Tklesson, we believe hard work deserves recognition. Our rewards program is designed to celebrate student dedication and encourage academic growth. Every session brings you closer to valuable perks.

Referral Bonus

When you refer a friend to Tklesson and they sign up for their first paid session, you earn one month of free access to Tklesson Premium. There is no limit to how many friends you can refer — each successful referral earns another free month. Share your referral link from your dashboard and start earning today.

How it works:

  1. Log in to your Tklesson dashboard and copy your unique referral link.
  2. Share it with friends, family, or classmates.
  3. When someone signs up and completes their first paid session using your link, the free month is automatically applied to your account.

Session Milestone Bonus

Students who complete 5 tutoring sessions earn one month of free Tklesson Premium access. This reward is automatic — once your fifth session is completed, the premium upgrade is applied to your account within 24 hours. Every additional set of 5 sessions earns another free month.

Tklesson Premium includes access to advanced learning tools, extended messaging with tutors, priority scheduling, and more.

Annual Presentation Competition

Each year, Tklesson hosts a presentation competition open to students who have completed 12 or more sessions in the calendar year. This competition celebrates communication skills, creativity, and academic excellence.

Prizes are awarded on December 20th every year:

PlacePrize
🥇 1st Place$500
🥈 2nd Place$300
🥉 3rd Place$200

Details including the presentation topic, submission guidelines, and judging criteria are announced each fall. Eligible students will receive an invitation via email and through their dashboard.
